spanish: Si pudiéramos escoger un momento al azar en la historia, desde el inicio de la vida, encontraríamos que la tasa de extinción es de solo una especie cada milenio.
english: If we could choose a random moment in history, from the beginning of life, we would find that the extinction rate is only one species every thousand years.
explanation: Past subjunctive (pudiéramos) in the if-clause for hypothetical situations, followed by conditional (encontraríamos) in the main clause

spanish: Estamos viviendo la sexta extinción masiva y esta vez estamos seguros de que la causa somos nosotros, los seres humanos.
english: We are living the sixth mass extinction and this time we are sure that the cause is us, human beings.
explanation: Present progressive (estamos viviendo) for ongoing actions; present indicative for current facts

spanish: La desaparición de una sola especie puede tener un efecto desproporcionado que colapse todo el ecosistema.
english: The disappearance of a single species can have a disproportionate effect that collapses the entire ecosystem.
explanation: Relative clause with present subjunctive (colapse) after indefinite antecedent expressing possibility
